content:
MODULE: cosmos.network.cosmos_mesh
FILE: cosmos/network/cosmos_mesh.py (306 lines)
CATEGORY: network

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS Temporal Hash Mesh + Quorum Verification
================================================

Layer 3: Temporal Hash Mesh
  - Nodes interleave their hash chains
  - Each heartbeat includes peer hashes
  - Mesh root = BLAKE3(sorted(all_node_hashes))
  - If one node is compromised, mesh diverges →

CLASSES:
- MeshEntry: A single node's entry in the hash mesh.
- TemporalHashMesh: Cryptographic mesh of interleaved hash chains.

Each node maintains its own chai
  Methods: def advance(self) -> bytes
  Methods: def update_peer(self, peer_name: str, peer_hash: bytes, peer_seq: int, gpu_fp: bytes=b'')
  Methods: def remove_peer(self, peer_name: str)
  Methods: def mesh_root(self) -> bytes
  Methods: def my_hash(self) -> bytes
  Methods: def my_sequence(self) -> int
  Methods: def peer_count(self) -> int
  Methods: def get_heartbeat_data(self) -> Dict
- SwarmQuorum: Quorum-based verification for new node connections.

A new connection is only ac
  Methods: def start_vote(self, request_id: str, candidate_name: str, candidate_identity: bytes, gpu_fp: bytes)
  Methods: def cast_vote(self, request_id: str, voter: str, approve: bool, reason: str='') -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def get_pending(self) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: def cleanup_stale(self, max_age: float=300.0)

INTERNAL DEPS: cosmos_auth, cosmos_config
